code:
%%{FinTech_AuthVault}}}%%

stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-06.01 — Hub Sync State (FinTech_AuthVault)

[FinTech_LedgerService] --> OUT_OF_SYNC : SyncRequested (FinTech_AuthVault)
note right of OUT_OF_SYNC
  Local hub detects divergence from federation:  
  • stale CRDT frame  
  • missing contributions or metrics  
  • network topology change  
end note

OUT_OF_SYNC --> FETCH_REMOTE : BeginSync
note right of FETCH_REMOTE
  Retrieve latest CRDT vector clocks and state diffs  
  from federation peers (FinTech_AuthVault)  
end note

FETCH_REMOTE --> MERGE : FrameDownloaded
note right of MERGE
  Apply CRDT merge function  
  Resolve conflicts deterministically  
  Ensure convergence on shared state
end note

MERGE --> VALIDATE : MergeCompleted
note right of VALIDATE
  Run schema + hash integrity checks  
  Validate contribution and governance deltas  
  Verify signatures from remote hubs  
end note

VALIDATE --> SYNCED : SyncConfirmed (FinTech_LedgerService)
note right of SYNCED
  Federation state consistent  
  Metrics & proposals aligned with global ledger  
end note

SYNCED --> [FinTech_AuthVault]

%% ---- Exceptional paths ----
FETCH_REMOTE --> FAILED : NetworkTimeout / AuthError
MERGE --> FAILED : ConflictUnresolved
VALIDATE --> FAILED : HashMismatch / SignatureInvalid
FAILED --> RETRY : RetryScheduled
RETRY --> OUT_OF_SYNC : RetrySync

%% ---- Maintenance / background ----
SYNCED --> OUT_OF_SYNC : PeriodicSync / ParamChange
OUT_OF_SYNC --> DEGRADED : HubOffline / LatencyHigh
DEGRADED --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue] : EscalatedToOps

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class OUT_OF_SYNC,FETCH_REMOTE,MERGE,VALIDATE,SYNCED,FAILED,RETRY,DEGRADED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech_AuthVault的Hub同步流程建一个状态机。核心场景是：当LedgerService发现本地hub和federation不同步时，怎么处理CRDT帧的同步和合并。
明白了。所以起点是LedgerService触发SyncRequested，进入OUT_OF_SYNC状态。这个状态需要记录本地hub检测到哪些具体异常吗？比如stale CRDT frame或者network topology change？
对，OUT_OF_SYNC的note里要列清楚：stale CRDT frame、missing contributions or metrics、还有network topology change。这三种情况都会触发同步。
好的，OUT_OF_SYNC之后通过BeginSync进入FETCH_REMOTE，这里去拉取federation peers的CRDT vector clocks和state diffs。然后FrameDownloaded触发MERGE状态，执行CRDT merge function。
MERGE之后要有一个VALIDATE状态，不能直接进入SYNCED。需要跑schema + hash integrity checks，还要verify signatures from remote hubs，防止恶意hub注入错误状态。
收到，VALIDATE通过之后SyncConfirmed回到LedgerService，进入SYNCED状态。这里SYNCED的note要强调federation state consistent，metrics和proposals与global ledger对齐。
异常路径也要覆盖。FETCH_REMOTE可能遇到NetworkTimeout或者AuthError，MERGE可能有ConflictUnresolved，VALIDATE可能有HashMismatch或SignatureInvalid。这些都要进到FAILED状态，然后RetryScheduled回到OUT_OF_SYNC重试。
还有一个场景：如果hub完全离线或者延迟太高，我们之前讨论的DEGRADED状态需要吗？这时候是不是要escalate到TransactionQueue？
对，OUT_OF_SYNC检测到HubOffline或LatencyHigh时进入DEGRADED，然后EscalatedToOps到FinTech_TransactionQueue。另外SYNCED也要能PeriodicSync回到OUT_OF_SYNC做定期同步。
